zh.lifeSummary: 當Walram II Paganus van Limburg於1085年出生在比利時利包格辛特-特盧易登時，他的父親Hendrik I van Limburg25歲，母親Adelheid von Pottenstein28歲。他於1105年之前與Jutta von Geldern-Wassenberg在爾利瓦瑟格結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1129年被列為 markgraaf van antwerpen。他去世於1139年7月16日享年54歲，埋葬在荷蘭利包格可可拉德洛勒度可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walram II Paganus van Limburg于1085年出生在比利时利包格辛特-特盧易登时，他的父亲Hendrik I van Limburg25岁，母亲Adelheid von Pottenstein28岁。他于1105年之前与Jutta von Geldern-Wassenberg在爾利瓦瑟格结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1129年被列为 markgraaf van antwerpen。他去世于1139年7月16日享年54岁，埋葬在荷兰利包格可可拉德洛勒度可。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Limburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places so named, the largest being in Hesse.

Dutch (also Van Limburg): habitational name for someone from the province of Limburg or from several places so named, like Limburg in the Belgian province of Liège or from Limbourg in Haut-Rhin, France, all named with the ancient Germanic elements lindo ‘lime tree’ or ‘dragon’ + burg ‘fortified place’.

nameMeanings.name: Walram
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Indian: from a personal name denoting the older brother of the god Krishna, an avatar of the god Vishnu. It means ‘Ram the strong one’, referring to his legendary muscular strength and penchant for using farm equipment (notably the plow) as weaponry. This surname is found mainly in Guyana, and also in South Africa and Trinidad and Tobago. It is apparently not used in India.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.description: In 1104 Augustinian monks founded an abbey, called Kloosterrade, to the west of this settlement.

en.lifeSummary: When Walram II Paganus van Limburg was born in 1085, in Sint-Truiden, Limburg, Belgium, his father, Hendrik I van Limburg, was 25 and his mother, Adelheid von Pottenstein, was 28. He married Jutta von Geldern-Wassenberg before 1105, in Wassenberg, Jülich. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. In 1129, his occupation is listed as  markgraaf van antwerpen. He died on 16 July 1139, at the age of 54, and was buried in Rolduc, Kerkrade, Limburg, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walram II Paganus van Limburg est né en 1085, à Sint-Truiden, Limbourg, Belgique, son père, Hendrik I van Limburg, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Adelheid von Pottenstein, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Jutta von Geldern-Wassenberg avant 1105, à Wassenberg, Jülich. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. En 1129, sa profession de son indiquée est  markgraaf van antwerpen. Il est décédé le 16 juillet 1139, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Rolduc, Kerkrade, Limbourg, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walram II Paganus van Limburg 1085 in Sint-Truiden, Limburg, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hendrik I van Limburg 25 und seine Mutter Adelheid von Pottenstein 28. Er hat vor 1105 in Wassenberg, Jülich Jutta von Geldern-Wassenberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1129 ist sein Beruf als  markgraaf van antwerpen aufgeführt. Er starb am 16. Juli 1139 im Alter von 54 Jahren und wurde in Rolduc, Kerkrade, Limburg, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walram II Paganus van Limburg è nato il nel 1085 nel Sint-Truiden, Limburgo, Belgio, il suo padre, Hendrik I van Limburg, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Adelheid von Pottenstein, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Jutta von Geldern-Wassenberg prima del 1105, nel Wassenberg, Jülich. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Nel 1129, la sua occupazione è indicata come  markgraaf van antwerpen. Morì il 16 luglio 1139, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Rolduc, Kerkrade, Limburgo, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Walram II Paganus van Limburgが1085年にベルギーリンブルグシント-トルイデンで生まれた時，父Hendrik I van Limburgは25歳，母Adelheid von Pottensteinは28歳であった。1105年以前にジuリチワセンバーグでJutta von Geldern-Wassenbergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1129年，職業は markgraaf van antwerpenと記録されている。彼は1139年7月16日に54歳で死去し，オランダリンブルグケルクラドロルドウックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walram II Paganus van Limburg(이)가 1085년 벨기에 림버그 신트-트루이든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hendrik I van Limburg(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelheid von Pottenstein(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1105년 이전 제이u리치 와센버그에서 Jutta von Geldern-Wassenberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1129년, 그의 직업은  markgraaf van antwerpen이었다. 그는 1139년 7월 16일 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 림버그 커크라드 롤드크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walram II Paganus van Limburg nasceu em 1085, em Sint-Truiden, Limburgo, Bélgica, seu pai, Hendrik I van Limburg, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid von Pottenstein, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Jutta von Geldern-Wassenberg antes 1105, em Wassenberg, Jülich. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Em 1129, sua profissão aparece como  markgraaf van antwerpen. Ele faleceu em 16 de julho de 1139, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Rolduc, Kerkrade, Limburgo, Países Baixos.

ro.Rolduc, Kerkrade, Limburg, Netherlands: Rolduc, Kerkrade, Limburg, Ţările de Jos

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walram II Paganus van Limburg родился в 1085 г. в местности синт-труиден, лимбург, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Hendrik I van Limburg было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Pottenstein, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Jutta von Geldern-Wassenberg перед 1105 г. в местности вассенбирг, джuлич. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. В 1129 году он работал по профессии  markgraaf van antwerpen. Он умер 16 июля 1139 г. в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности ролдук, киркрад, лимбург, Нидерланды.

sm.1129-1139: mai le 1129 e o'o I le 1139
sm.1115-1139: mai le 1115 e o'o I le 1139

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walram II Paganus van Limburg nació en 1085, en Sint-Truiden, Limburgo, Bélgica, su papá, Hendrik I van Limburg, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Adelheid von Pottenstein, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Jutta von Geldern-Wassenberg antes de 1105, en Wassenberg, Jülich. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. En 1129, su ocupación registrada era  markgraaf van antwerpen. Murió el 16 de julio de 1139, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Rolduc, Kerkrade, Limburg, Países Bajos.
